description: IPInfoDB provides IP address geolocation and lookup information. Its website now primarily points users to IP2Location.io, and public signup for the legacy IPInfoDB API is closed.
summary: ipinfodb.com exposes one legacy HTTP IP geolocation lookup API at https://api.ipinfodb.com, documented via SwaggerHub/OpenAPI and authenticated with a query-parameter API key; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
